query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(630001, 'How many books are in the New Testament?', 'multiple_choice', '["27 books", "39 books", "22 books", "66 books"]', '27 books', 1),
(630001, 'In what language was most of the New Testament originally written?', 'multiple_choice', '["Koine Greek", "Hebrew", "Aramaic", "Latin"]', 'Koine Greek', 2),
(630001, 'Which category of New Testament books contains accounts of Jesus'' life and ministry?', 'multiple_choice', '["The Gospels", "The Pauline Epistles", "The General Epistles", "Acts of the Apostles"]', 'The Gospels', 3),
(630001, 'What historical power occupied Palestine during the New Testament period?', 'multiple_choice', '["The Roman Empire", "The Greek Empire", "The Persian Empire", "The Babylonian Empire"]', 'The Roman Empire', 4),
(630001, 'Which book narrates the early church''s development?', 'multiple_choice', '["Acts of the Apostles", "Romans", "Hebrews", "James"]', 'Acts of the Apostles', 5),
(630001, 'What is the final book of the New Testament?', 'multiple_choice', '["Revelation", "Jude", "3 John", "Hebrews"]', 'Revelation', 6),
(630001, 'According to 2 Timothy 3:16-17, Scripture is described as what?', 'multiple_choice', '["God-breathed", "Man-inspired", "Historically accurate", "Culturally relevant"]', 'God-breathed', 7),
(630001, 'What facilitated the spread of the Gospel message throughout the Mediterranean world?', 'multiple_choice', '["A common language (Koine Greek)", "Roman military roads", "Jewish synagogues", "All of the above"]', 'A common language (Koine Greek)', 8),
(630001, 'According to John 20:31, what is the purpose of John''s Gospel?', 'multiple_choice', '["That readers might believe Jesus is the Christ", "To provide a historical record", "To refute false teaching", "To establish church order"]', 'That readers might believe Jesus is the Christ', 9),
(630001, 'The New Testament reveals Jesus Christ as the fulfillment of what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Old Testament prophecy", "Greek philosophy", "Roman law", "Jewish tradition"]', 'Old Testament prophecy', 10),
(630001, 'Explain the relationship between the Old Testament and New Testament, and why understanding this relationship is important for studying Scripture.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'The New Testament fulfills Old Testament prophecy and reveals Jesus Christ as the promised Messiah.', 11);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES

(630001, 'In what language was most of the New Testament originally written?', 'multiple_choice', '["Koine Greek", "Hebrew", "Aramaic", "Latin"]', 'Koine Greek', 2),

(630001, 'What is the final book of the New Testament?', 'multiple_choice', '["Revelation", "Jude", "3 John", "Hebrews"]', 'Revelation', 6),
(630001, 'According to 2 Timothy 3:16-17, Scripture is described as what?', 'multiple_choice', '["God-breathed", "Man-inspired", "Historically accurate", "Culturally relevant"]', 'God-breathed', 7),
(630001, 'What facilitated the spread of the Gospel message throughout the Mediterranean world?', 'multiple_choice', '["A common language (Koine Greek)", "Roman military roads", "Jewish synagogues", "All of the above"]', 'A common language (Koine Greek)', 8),
(630001, 'According to John 20:31, what is the purpose of John''s Gospel?', 'multiple_choice', '["That readers might believe Jesus is the Christ", "To provide a historical record", "To refute false teaching", "To establish church order"]', 'That readers might believe Jesus is the Christ', 9),
(630001, 'The New Testament reveals Jesus Christ as the fulfillment of what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Old Testament prophecy", "Greek philosophy", "Roman law", "Jewish tradition"]', 'Old Testament prophecy', 10),
(630001, 'Explain the relationship between the Old Testament and New Testament, and why understanding this relationship is important for studying Scripture.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'The New Testament fulfills Old Testament prophecy and reveals Jesus Christ as the promised Messiah.', 11);
